name: Married filing jointly - Median household income
description: Married couple with €80,000 household income in Berlin, Ehegattensplitting applied

sources.description: Income tax (€9,722) verified via BMF Einkommensteuer-Berechnungsprogramm 2025 for zvE=63,882 (verheiratet/verpartnert). Ehegattensplitting: split=31,941, tax=4,861 × 2.
sources.notes: §32a EStG 2025: https://www.gesetze-im-internet.de/estg/__32a.html. Berlin (BE) standard care rate 2.4% childless. Sonderausgaben €72 (married). zvE = 80,000 - 16,117.73 = 63,882.
